api: Systeme.io public API (https://api.systeme.io/api; documented at https://developer.systeme.io/reference/api, a ReadMe.io-hosted reference whose full OpenAPI spec is not publicly fetchable without a ReadMe.io session)
scope: Pass B full-surface expansion. Systeme.io's public API has no publicly fetchable OpenAPI/Swagger document (the ReadMe.io-hosted reference renders its operation detail client-side behind an authenticated project session) and no published Postman collection; every endpoint below was independently confirmed LIVE against https://api.systeme.io/api via unauthenticated OPTIONS requests (the Allow response header lists exactly the methods the real server accepts for that path today), cross-checked against systeme.io's own help-center article 'How to use systeme.io's public API' (help.systeme.io/article/2329, last updated 2026-06-05) which names contact/tag/contact-field/subscription/newsletter management as the documented feature set. 6 read streams and 14 write actions cover every OPTIONS-confirmed live path: contacts, tags, contact_fields, funnels, funnel_steps (fan_out over funnels), and webhooks, plus contact-tag assignment. Newsletter management (create/update/list/retrieve, named in the help article) could NOT be independently confirmed: GET/POST /api/newsletters both returned a bare 404 with no Allow header during live probing (a 404 with no Allow header, unlike every confirmed real path's 405-with-Allow-header shape when probed with an unsupported method, indicates the router has no route registered at that exact path at all) -- excluded as requires_elevated_scope (no confirmable live path) rather than guessed at. Courses, communities-list (communities/{id} IS live and GET-only, but has no discovering list endpoint), and subscription-resource management (named in the help article) are excluded as requires_elevated_scope for the same reason -- no confirmable path or no discovery path.

excluded.reason: single-contact detail (live-confirmed via OPTIONS: Allow: GET, PATCH, DELETE); identical record shape to the contacts list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-tag detail (live-confirmed via OPTIONS: Allow: GET, PUT, DELETE); identical record shape to the tags list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream
single-contact-field detail (live-confirmed via OPTIONS: Allow: GET, PATCH, DELETE); identical record shape to the contact_fields list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

single-funnel detail (live-confirmed via OPTIONS: Allow: GET only -- no PATCH/DELETE exist for this resource); identical record shape to the funnels list stream's per-item object, already covered by that stream

live-probed and found NOT to exist: GET/OPTIONS /api/webhooks/{id} return a bare 404 with no Allow header (the same no-route signature as newsletters below), unlike every other resource's confirmed id-scoped path -- webhooks appear to be create/list-only with no per-id detail/update/delete in the current live API

live-confirmed to exist (OPTIONS: Allow: GET), but GET /api/communities (bare, no id) returns a 404 with no Allow header -- there is no list/discovery endpoint to enumerate community ids, so this cannot be modeled as a syncable stream without an id already in hand from an external source

named in systeme.io's own help-center article ('Newsletter management: create and update newsletters... list and retrieve newsletters') but live-probed and found NOT to exist at this path: both GET and POST return a bare 404 with no Allow header (no route registered), unlike every confirmed real path's 405-with-Allow-header response to an unsupported method -- the documented feature may live at a different, undiscovered path this review could not find or may not yet be deployed; excluded rather than guessed at
same live-probe result as the GET endpoint above

named in systeme.io's own help-center article ('Retrieve subscription resources... Unsubscription') but no path variant (/api/subscriptions, /api/subscription, /api/subscription-plans) could be confirmed live via OPTIONS probing during this review; excluded as unconfirmed rather than guessed at

no live path could be confirmed via OPTIONS probing (/api/courses returns a bare 404 with no Allow header); course/student management is an open feature request on Systeme.io's own product roadmap (roadmap.systeme.io/c/228), i.e. explicitly not yet part of the public API

bare-collection GET returns a 404 with no Allow header (no list endpoint exists, see the communities/{id} entry above); full community management is also an open feature request on Systeme.io's own product roadmap (roadmap.systeme.io/c/227)
